Confidence level 38, well under 50 threshold.

observations.text: Exceptional identification and escalation of the PM/Legal guarantee vs best-effort contradiction, with three concrete resolution options and a practical recommendation.
9 business rules extracted — well above the 5 minimum — with thoughtful invariant classifications and testable assertions.
5 formal escalations covering contradiction, ambiguity, and missing context — well above the 2 minimum.
Confidence level of 35 appropriately reflects the severity of unresolved contradictions.
Wrong-address ambiguity elevated to a full escalation with three resolution options, not just noted in passing.
10 edge cases identified, many of which are genuinely non-obvious (e.g., replacement driver also cancels, customer unreachable, boundary condition at exactly 10km).
Clock-start ambiguity addressed both in assumptions and indirectly through the pickup SLA miss escalation.
Rejection reasons appropriately block implementation until core contradictions are resolved.
BR-3 (driver rating >= 4 stars) marked as invariant: false, but rubric expects invariant: true as a quality gate. Defensible reasoning provided but diverges from expected classification.
